title: Everything Modrinth
description: This modpack aims to include every project on modrinth excluding modpacks (ofc) and plugins. Currently 300+ Projects
body:
1. ⚠️ I Wont ever include any **anime** project ⚠️




2. ⚠️ **May use more than 8 gb of memory** ⚠️


## 👋 Everything Modrinth 

Dive into the ultimate chaos with Everything Modrinth, a modpack that merges all Modrinth projects into a thrilling adventure! Everything Modrinth offers a diverse set of features, including gameplay overhauls and niche utility mods, ensuring a dynamic experience. Get ready for unforeseen crashes, unusual interactions, and a flurry of mods that take Minecraft to its maximum potential.

Whether you’re in for the ride or just curious to see what happens when every mod collides, this modpack offers a hilarious, unpredictable, and pure madness-filled adventure.

## ⚙️ Will it lag a lot?

Yes, a modpack that includes every project on Modrinth would lag a lot! Here are some reasons:

**Vast Array of Mods:** Modrinth offers a wide selection of mods, ranging from minor utility changes to extensive gameplay transformations. Trying to run them all at once would overwhelm many low mid-range computers.

**Conflicting Mods:** Many mods on Modrinth might not work together, causing incompatibilities and conflicts, leading to crashes or performance issues. (This Will be less prevalent the more it gets updated )

**Heavy Modifications:** Some mods alter world generation, add new mobs, dimensions, and complex mechanics, which would put an immense strain on your CPU and memory.

**Excessive Entities:** Many mods add tons of new entities (mobs, items, etc.), increasing the number of things the game has to keep track of, making it even more laggy.

**Poor Optimization:** Not all mods are optimized, especially when thrown together in such massive numbers.. Mods with un-optimized code can affect performance.

While it is a hilarious and chaotic experience, expect low frame rates, long load times, and potential crashes, even on high-end systems!

I made this project to explore the potential of Minecraft with all kinds of creations, hoping others would share the same curiosity.
